title: Bare Metals x Stuff N' Additions
description: A Bare Bones (and Bare Metals) addon for Create: Stuff N' Additions
body:
![Resource Pack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77153e7e6e43d22cc100ab32da040270f36a5286.png)

### Bare Metals - Expanded

Retextures the Create addon Stuff N' Additions to fit in with Bare Bones, and Bare Metals.

### Compatibility

This texture pack requires the [Createe](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) mod, [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) resource pack, [Bare Metals](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-metals), and the Create mod addon, [Stuff N' Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-stuff-additions), all made by amazingly talented people. 

Further versions will be added sometime in the future.

## Contact

You can find me in the Bare Bones Discord Server. 

Username: venenoir

Display Name: Rosie

I have a [Google Issue Form](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSexYWUHry04VcV9PAKD4-wxOazOoZSYTFQ6iMBtzwY4z45nSw/viewform?usp=dialog) for criticism and issue reports! Please feel free to leave constructive criticism and report issues here!
